steps.name: 61. Tradesman navigates to login page and logs in
62. Switch to Tradesman Mailsac inbox tab (Tab 3) and reload
63. Poll Mailsac — wait for "Account Verified Successfully" email to arrive
64. Reload Tradesman Mailsac inbox so the verified email is listed
Wait for selector locator('a, tr, div').filter({ hasText: /verified|verification|welcome to our platform|account verified/i }).first()
Click locator('a, tr, div').filter({ hasText: /verified|verification|welcome to our platform|account verified/i }).first()
65. Click the "Account Verified Successfully" email to open it
